mapper.select: SELECT id, product_name, description, image_url, price, stock, status, created_at, updated_at FROM t_product WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, product_name, description, image_url, price, stock, status, created_at, updated_at FROM t_product WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_product (product_name, description, image_url, price, stock, status) VALUES (#{productName}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_product SET stock = #{stock} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_product SET stock = stock - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND stock > 0
